channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Sourcegraph Takes on GitHub Copilot with AI-Powered Coding Agents
item.description: Sourcegraph has announced coding agents for code review, migration, testing, documentation, and notification, along with an API for custom agents, aiming to challenge GitHub Copilot's dominance in AI-powered coding assistance.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
